title: ilex perryana
intro: Ilex perryana, also known as Yaupon holly, is a species of evergreen shrub or small tree native to North America, particularly in the southeastern regions. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Ilex perryana include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Ilex perryana can be found in tea, tincture, or capsule form, and it is often consumed as a traditional beverage, particularly in the United States and Mexico.
